revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 満宮神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=田方郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|4|36|N|138|55|51.7|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[田方郡]][[函南町]]塚本413 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|4|36|N|138|55|51.7|E|display=inline,title}} |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=満宮神社|coordinates= {{coord2|35|4|36|N|138|55|51.7|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} |祭神 = [[誉田別命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]論社 |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月15日 |神事 = }} '''満宮神社'''（まんぐうじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[田方郡]][[函南町]]塚本地区に鎮座する[[神社]]<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 満宮神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 塚本地区の田園地帯の中央にある小高い丘である森山の南麓に鎮座している<ref name="isan">[https://kannami13.sakura.ne.jp/geo-8.html 森山] - 函南遺産</ref>。
[[式内社]]である'''文梨神社'''（ふみなしじんじゃ）の論社である<ref>[https://shrineheritager.com/mangu-shrine/amp/ 満宮神社] - Shrine Heritager</ref>。
祭神から元来は[[八幡宮]]であり、それが訛って「満宮」になったと考えられる。
== 祭神 == * [[誉田別命]]
== 境内社 == * 森山稲荷神社 - 森山の頂上に鎮座する<ref name="isan"/>。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 満宮神社] - 静岡県神社庁
{{デフォルトソート:まんくうしんしや}} [[Category:静岡県の神社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:八幡宮]] [[Category:函南町の建築物]] [[Category:函南町の歴史]]

{{神社 |名称 = 満宮神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=田方郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|4|36|N|138|55|51.7|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[田方郡]][[函南町]]塚本413 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|4|36|N|138|55|51.7|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=満宮神社|coordinates= {{coord2|35|4|36|N|138|55|51.7|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} |祭神 = [[誉田別命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]論社 |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月15日 |神事 = }} '''満宮神社'''（まんぐうじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[田方郡]][[函南町]]塚本地区に鎮座する[[神社]]<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 満宮神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 塚本地区の田園地帯の中央にある小高い丘である森山の南麓に鎮座している<ref name="isan">[https://kannami13.sakura.ne.jp/geo-8.html 森山] - 函南遺産</ref>。
[[式内社]]である'''文梨神社'''（ふみなしじんじゃ）の論社である<ref>[https://shrineheritager.com/mangu-shrine/amp/ 満宮神社] - Shrine Heritager</ref>。
祭神から元来は[[八幡宮]]であり、それが訛って「満宮」になったと考えられる。
== 祭神 == * [[誉田別命]]
== 境内社 == * 森山稲荷神社 - 森山の頂上に鎮座する<ref name="isan"/>。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 満宮神社] - 静岡県神社庁
{{デフォルトソート:まんくうしんしや}} [[Category:静岡県の神社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:八幡宮]] [[Category:函南町の建築物]] [[Category:函南町の歴史]]

{{nihongo|'''Manguu Shrine'''|満宮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Manguu Shrine'''|満宮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Manguu Shrine'''|満宮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Manguu Shrine'''|満宮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Manguu Shrine'''|満宮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Manguu Shrine'''|満宮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Manguu Shrine'''|満宮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Manguu Shrine'''|満宮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Manguu Shrine'''|満宮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

revision.comment: 2 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 満宮神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=田方郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|4|36|N|138|55|51.7|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[田方郡]][[函南町]]塚本413 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|4|36|N|138|55|51.7|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=満宮神社|coordinates= {{coord2|35|4|36|N|138|55|51.7|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} |祭神 = [[誉田別命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]論社 |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月15日 |神事 = }} '''満宮神社'''（まんぐうじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[田方郡]][[函南町]]塚本地区に鎮座する[[神社]]<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 満宮神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 塚本地区の田園地帯の中央にある小高い丘である森山の南麓に鎮座している<ref name="isan">[https://kannami13.sakura.ne.jp/geo-8.html 森山] - 函南遺産</ref>。
[[式内社]]である'''文梨神社'''（ふみなしじんじゃ）の論社である<ref>[https://shrineheritager.com/mangu-shrine/amp/ 満宮神社] - Shrine Heritager</ref>。
祭神から元来は[[八幡宮]]であり、それが訛って「満宮」になったと考えられる。
== 祭神 == * [[誉田別命]]
== 境内社 == * 森山稲荷神社 - 森山の頂上に鎮座する<ref name="isan"/>。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 満宮神社] - 静岡県神社庁
{{デフォルトソート:まんくうしんしや}} [[Category:静岡県の神社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:八幡宮]] [[Category:函南町の建築物]] [[Category:函南町の歴史]]

== Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 満宮神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=田方郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|35|4|36|N|138|55|51.7|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[田方郡]][[函南町]]塚本413 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|4|36|N|138|55|51.7|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=満宮神社|coordinates= {{coord2|35|4|36|N|138|55|51.7|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} |祭神 = [[誉田別命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]論社 |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月15日 |神事 = }} '''満宮神社'''（まんぐうじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[田方郡]][[函南町]]塚本地区に鎮座する[[神社]]<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 満宮神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。
== 概要 == 塚本地区の田園地帯の中央にある小高い丘である森山の南麓に鎮座している<ref name="isan">[https://kannami13.sakura.ne.jp/geo-8.html 森山] - 函南遺産</ref>。
[[式内社]]である'''文梨神社'''（ふみなしじんじゃ）の論社である<ref>[https://shrineheritager.com/mangu-shrine/amp/ 満宮神社] - Shrine Heritager</ref>。
祭神から元来は[[八幡宮]]であり、それが訛って「満宮」になったと考えられる。
== 祭神 == * [[誉田別命]]
== 境内社 == * 森山稲荷神社 - 森山の頂上に鎮座する<ref name="isan"/>。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 満宮神社] - 静岡県神社庁

==End Japanese==

== 概要 == 塚本地区の田園地帯の中央にある小高い丘である森山の南麓に鎮座している<ref name="isan">[https://kannami13.sakura.ne.jp/geo-8.html 森山] - 函南遺産</ref>。
[[式内社]]である'''文梨神社'''（ふみなしじんじゃ）の論社である<ref>[https://shrineheritager.com/mangu-shrine/amp/ 満宮神社] - Shrine Heritager</ref>。
祭神から元来は[[八幡宮]]であり、それが訛って「満宮」になったと考えられる。
== 祭神 == * [[誉田別命]]
== 境内社 == * 森山稲荷神社 - 森山の頂上に鎮座する<ref name="isan"/>。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 満宮神社] - 静岡県神社庁
==End Japanese== [[Category:静岡県の神社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:八幡宮]] [[Category:函南町の建築物]] [[Category:函南町の歴史]]

'''満宮神社'''（まんぐうじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|田方郡|Q1154841}}{{jalink|函南町|Q1203533}}塚本地区に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 満宮神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
塚本地区の田園地帯の中央にある小高い丘である森山の南麓に鎮座している<ref name="isan">[https://kannami13.sakura.ne.jp/geo-8.html 森山] - 函南遺産</ref>。

{{jalink|式内社}}である'''文梨神社'''（ふみなしじんじゃ）の論社である<ref>[https://shrineheritager.com/mangu-shrine/amp/ 満宮神社] - Shrine Heritager</ref>。

祭神から元来は{{jalink|八幡宮|Q11390939}}であり、それが訛って「満宮」になったと考えられる。

=== 祭神 ===
* {{jalink|誉田別命}}

=== 境内社 ===
* 森山稲荷神社 - 森山の頂上に鎮座する<ref name="isan"/>。

=== 脚注 ===
{{Reflist}}

=== 外部リンク ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 満宮神社] - 静岡県神社庁

{{デフォルトソート:まんくうしんしや}}

'''満宮神社'''（まんぐうじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|田方郡|Q1154841}}{{jalink|函南町|Q1203533}}塚本地区に鎮座する{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 満宮神社] - 静岡県神社庁</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
塚本地区の田園地帯の中央にある小高い丘である森山の南麓に鎮座している<ref name="isan">[https://kannami13.sakura.ne.jp/geo-8.html 森山] - 函南遺産</ref>。

{{jalink|式内社}}である'''文梨神社'''（ふみなしじんじゃ）の論社である<ref>[https://shrineheritager.com/mangu-shrine/amp/ 満宮神社] - Shrine Heritager</ref>。

祭神から元来は{{jalink|八幡宮|Q11390939}}であり、それが訛って「満宮」になったと考えられる。

=== 祭神 ===
* {{jalink|誉田別命}}

=== 境内社 ===
* 森山稲荷神社 - 森山の頂上に鎮座する<ref name="isan"/>。

=== 脚注 ===
{{Reflist}}

=== 外部リンク ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 満宮神社] - 静岡県神社庁

{{デフォルトソート:まんくうしんしや}}

'''Mangū Shrine''' (まんぐうじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in the Tsukamoto district of {{jalink|Kannami Town|Q1203533}}, {{jalink|Tagata District|Q1154841}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}.<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 Mangū Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>

=== Overview ===
The shrine is situated on the southern foothills of Moriyama, a small hill located in the center of the rural Tsukamoto area.<ref name="isan">[https://kannami13.sakura.ne.jp/geo-8.html Moriyama] - Kannami Heritage</ref>

It is considered a disputed shrine (ronsha) of '''Fuminashi Shrine''' (ふみなしじんじゃ), which is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}.<ref>[https://shrineheritager.com/mangu-shrine/amp/ Mangū Shrine] - Shrine Heritager</ref>

Based on the enshrined deity, it was originally a {{jalink|Hachimangū|Q11390939}}, and it is thought that this name later became corrupted into “Mangū.”

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Hondawake no Mikoto}}

=== Auxiliary shrines ===
* Moriyama Inari Shrine – located at the summit of Moriyama.<ref name="isan"/>

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 Mangū Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines

{{Default sort: Mangū Shrine}}

It is considered a disputed shrine (ronsha) of '''Fuminashi Shrine''' (ふみなしじんじゃ), which is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}}.<ref>[https://shrineheritager.com/mangu-shrine/amp/ Mangū Shrine] - Shrine Heritager</ref>

Based on the enshrined deity, it was originally a {{jalink|Hachimangū|Q11390939}}, and it is thought that this name later became corrupted into “Mangū.”

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Hondawake no Mikoto}}

=== Auxiliary shrines ===
* Moriyama Inari Shrine – located at the summit of Moriyama.<ref name="isan"/>

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 Mangū Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines

'''Mangū Shrine''' (まんぐうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in the Tsukamoto district of {{ill|lt=Kannami Town|Q1203533|WD=Q1203533|1=Kannami}}, {{ill|lt=Tagata District|Q1154841|WD=Q1154841|1=Tagata District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 Mangū Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>

=== Overview ===
The shrine is situated on the southern foothills of Moriyama, a small hill located in the center of the rural Tsukamoto area.<ref name="isan">[https://kannami13.sakura.ne.jp/geo-8.html Moriyama] - Kannami Heritage</ref>

It is considered a disputed shrine (ronsha) of '''Fuminashi Shrine''' (ふみなしじんじゃ), which is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}.<ref>[https://shrineheritager.com/mangu-shrine/amp/ Mangū Shrine] - Shrine Heritager</ref>

Based on the enshrined deity, it was originally a {{ill|lt=Hachimangū|Q11390939|WD=Q11390939|1=Hachiman shrine}}, and it is thought that this name later became corrupted into “Mangū.”

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q317997|lt=Hondawake no Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}

=== Auxiliary shrines ===
* Moriyama Inari Shrine – located at the summit of Moriyama.<ref name="isan"/>

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 Mangū Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines

'''Mangū Shrine''' (まんぐうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in the Tsukamoto district of {{ill|lt=Kannami Town|Q1203533|WD=Q1203533|1=Kannami}}, {{ill|lt=Tagata District|Q1154841|WD=Q1154841|1=Tagata District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 Mangū Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>

=== Overview ===
The shrine is situated on the southern foothills of Moriyama, a small hill located in the center of the rural Tsukamoto area.<ref name="isan">[https://kannami13.sakura.ne.jp/geo-8.html Moriyama] - Kannami Heritage</ref>

It is considered a disputed shrine (ronsha) of '''Fuminashi Shrine''' (ふみなしじんじゃ), which is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}.<ref>[https://shrineheritager.com/mangu-shrine/amp/ Mangū Shrine] - Shrine Heritager</ref>

Based on the enshrined deity, it was originally a {{ill|lt=Hachimangū|Q11390939|WD=Q11390939|1=Hachiman shrine}}, and it is thought that this name later became corrupted into “Mangū.”

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q317997|lt=Hondawake no Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}

=== Auxiliary shrines ===
* Moriyama Inari Shrine – located at the summit of Moriyama.<ref name="isan"/>

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 Mangū Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines

'''Mangū Shrine''' (まんぐうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in the Tsukamoto district of {{ill|lt=Kannami Town|Q1203533|WD=Q1203533|1=Kannami}}, {{ill|lt=Tagata District|Q1154841|WD=Q1154841|1=Tagata District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 Mangū Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>

=== Overview ===
The shrine is situated on the southern foothills of Moriyama, a small hill located in the center of the rural Tsukamoto area.<ref name="isan">[https://kannami13.sakura.ne.jp/geo-8.html Moriyama] - Kannami Heritage</ref>

It is considered a disputed shrine (ronsha) of '''Fuminashi Shrine''' (ふみなしじんじゃ), which is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}.<ref>[https://shrineheritager.com/mangu-shrine/amp/ Mangū Shrine] - Shrine Heritager</ref>

Based on the enshrined deity, it was originally a {{ill|lt=Hachimangū|Q11390939|WD=Q11390939|1=Hachiman shrine}}, and it is thought that this name later became corrupted into “Mangū.”

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q317997|lt=Hondawake no Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}

=== Auxiliary shrines ===
* Moriyama Inari Shrine – located at the summit of Moriyama.<ref name="isan"/>

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 Mangū Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines

{{Default sort: Mangū Shrine}}

'''Mangū Shrine''' (まんぐうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in the Tsukamoto district of {{ill|lt=Kannami Town|Q1203533|WD=Q1203533|1=Kannami}}, {{ill|lt=Tagata District|Q1154841|WD=Q1154841|1=Tagata District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 Mangū Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>

=== Overview ===
The shrine is situated on the southern foothills of Moriyama, a small hill located in the center of the rural Tsukamoto area.<ref name="isan">[https://kannami13.sakura.ne.jp/geo-8.html Moriyama] - Kannami Heritage</ref>

It is considered a disputed shrine (ronsha) of '''Fuminashi Shrine''' (ふみなしじんじゃ), which is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}.<ref>[https://shrineheritager.com/mangu-shrine/amp/ Mangū Shrine] - Shrine Heritager</ref>

Based on the enshrined deity, it was originally a {{ill|lt=Hachimangū|Q11390939|WD=Q11390939|1=Hachiman shrine}}, and it is thought that this name later became corrupted into “Mangū.”

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q317997|lt=Hondawake no Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}

=== Auxiliary shrines ===
* Moriyama Inari Shrine – located at the summit of Moriyama.<ref name="isan"/>

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 Mangū Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines

'''Mangū Shrine''' (まんぐうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in the Tsukamoto district of {{ill|lt=Kannami Town|Q1203533|WD=Q1203533|1=Kannami}}, {{ill|lt=Tagata District|Q1154841|WD=Q1154841|1=Tagata District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 Mangū Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>

=== Overview ===
The shrine is situated on the southern foothills of Moriyama, a small hill located in the center of the rural Tsukamoto area.<ref name="isan">[https://kannami13.sakura.ne.jp/geo-8.html Moriyama] - Kannami Heritage</ref>

It is considered a disputed shrine (ronsha) of '''Fuminashi Shrine''' (ふみなしじんじゃ), which is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}.<ref>[https://shrineheritager.com/mangu-shrine/amp/ Mangū Shrine] - Shrine Heritager</ref>

Based on the enshrined deity, it was originally a {{ill|lt=Hachimangū|Q11390939|WD=Q11390939|1=Hachiman shrine}}, and it is thought that this name later became corrupted into “Mangū.”

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q317997|lt=Hondawake no Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}

=== Auxiliary shrines ===
* Moriyama Inari Shrine – located at the summit of Moriyama.<ref name="isan"/>

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 Mangū Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines

{{Default sort: Mangū Shrine}}

'''Mangū Shrine''' (まんぐうじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in the Tsukamoto district of {{ill|lt=Kannami Town|Q1203533|WD=Q1203533|1=Kannami}}, {{ill|lt=Tagata District|Q1154841|WD=Q1154841|1=Tagata District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.<ref name="yuisho">[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 Mangū Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines</ref>

=== Overview ===
The shrine is situated on the southern foothills of Moriyama, a small hill located in the center of the rural Tsukamoto area.<ref name="isan">[https://kannami13.sakura.ne.jp/geo-8.html Moriyama] - Kannami Heritage</ref>

It is considered a disputed shrine (ronsha) of '''Fuminashi Shrine''' (ふみなしじんじゃ), which is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}}.<ref>[https://shrineheritager.com/mangu-shrine/amp/ Mangū Shrine] - Shrine Heritager</ref>

Based on the enshrined deity, it was originally a {{ill|lt=Hachimangū|Q11390939|WD=Q11390939|1=Hachiman shrine}}, and it is thought that this name later became corrupted into “Mangū.”

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q317997|lt=Hondawake no Mikoto|1=Emperor Ōjin}}

=== Auxiliary shrines ===
* Moriyama Inari Shrine – located at the summit of Moriyama.<ref name="isan"/>

=== Notes ===
{{Reflist}}

=== External links ===
* [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402077 Mangū Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines

{{Default sort: Mangū Shrine}}
